resolution_rules.repository: Resolve the default-branch head and pull-request state from live GitHub at read time.
resolution_rules.ci_and_reviews: Resolve CI and reviews against the exact source commit under evaluation.
resolution_rules.azure: Repository, CI, and historical planner evidence do not prove current Azure state or authorize Azure mutation.
resolution_rules.temporary_write_authority: Repository write authority is valid only for the declared branch, open pull request, and permitted paths, and expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges.

last_substantive_baseline.title: Promote bounded live report publication
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves that the bounded execution workflow and supporting repository controls were merged. It does not prove workflow dispatch, current price/quota/policy, effective Azure permissions, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob CORS response, browser rendering, or a committed live frontend source.

repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded GitHub observation. Re-resolve repository, CI, review, workflow-run, and Azure state whenever this record is read.

workstreams.write_owner: This ChatGPT conversation — bounded Azure IaC project-state reconciliation explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
workstreams.objective: Reconcile repository-native project state and handoff documentation to the live PR #41 merge without changing workflows, scripts, infrastructure, Azure resources, permissions, deployments, runtime systems, or frontend source.

capability_boundary.repository_writes: Only the declared branch and two permitted paths before pull-request closure or merge

verification_criteria: live main head is recorded as c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e
PR #41 is recorded as merged from source head 722dfcf99c367880147c9fd2f183d54d4d960f56
exact-head CI run 29976628311 and its two successful jobs are preserved
owner-account technical review is distinguished from independent organizational approval
the execution workflow is recorded as present on main but not dispatched or operationally verified
Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, report publication, manual repair, and browser verification remain false or unobserved
the final pull-request diff contains exactly the two declared paths
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: Temporary repository-write authority expires when the reconciliation pull request closes or merges.
workstreams.rollback: Close the reconciliation pull request without merge. No Azure, workflow, deployment, runtime, or frontend rollback applies.

bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This historical grant authorizes only the bounded read-only planner path. It does not authorize the merged publication execution workflow, deployment, RBAC changes, report publication, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

completed_increments.title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
Repair read-only planner RBAC evidence capture
Use ProviderNoRbac for read-only ARM planning
Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS

proven: exact reviewed commit checkout and bounded authority validation succeeded
Azure OIDC login and current resource-group and collector inventory succeeded
What-If contained 21 Ignore and exactly four Create changes
the creates were one Storage account, one Blob service, one $web Blob-only container, and one Storage-scoped collector role assignment
zero Modify, Delete, and Replace changes were present
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
unproven: current Storage pricing, quota, and policy allowance
current collector identity and publisher availability
browser rendering and committed live frontend source

pr42_blob_endpoint_repair.claim_boundary: Architecture and read-only plan only; not Azure execution or browser proof.

pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository promotion is merged. No publication workflow run, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob/browser proof, or manual repair is established.

authority_state.rule: The merged workflow is executable code, not operational authority. A separate explicit dispatch and Azure-mutation authorization is required after fresh execution-time evidence.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.workflow_dispatch: Require a concrete workflow-run identifier and job evidence; workflow presence alone is insufficient.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations, CI, and historical artifacts are insufficient.
